pages.text: Aero has 6 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:aero_core_t1, kubejs:aero_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:aero_core_t1$() gates: createpropulsion:stirling_engine, createpropulsion:solid_burner, simulated:rope_connector
$(li)$(item)kubejs:aero_core_t2$() gates: createpropulsion:thruster, createpropulsion:wing, simulated:rope_winch
$(li)$(item)kubejs:aero_core_t3$() gates: createpropulsion:liquid_vector_thruster, createpropulsion:tilt_adapter, simulated:gimbal_sensor
$(li)$(item)kubejs:aero_core_t4$() gates: createpropulsion:ion_thruster, createpropulsion:redstone_transmission, simulated:docking_connector
$(li)$(item)kubejs:aero_core_t5$() gates: createbigcannons:cannon_mount, createbigcannons:cannon_builder
$(li)$(item)kubejs:aero_core_t6$() gates: createbigcannons:autocannon_ammo_container
